title: House Manager (Household Management / Event Coordination / Collection Management) HSW
description:
Key Responsibilities:

Daily Operations:

  • Household Management: Ensure the residence is impeccably maintained and organized, including managing routine and deep cleaning, and coordinating repairs and maintenance.
  • Staff Supervision: Lead and schedule a team of household staff, including housekeepers, chefs, gardeners, and drivers. Responsibilities include recruitment, training, and performance evaluations.

Event Coordination:

  • Event Planning: Plan and execute high-profile events, social gatherings, and family functions, managing everything from invitations to catering and decorations.

Private Collection Management:

  • Collection Care: Oversee the care and maintenance of the family’s private collection, including artworks, antiques, rare books, or other valuable items.
  • Ensure proper handling, preservation, and security of these assets.
  • Inventory and Documentation: Maintain accurate records of the collection, including provenance, condition, and value. Coordinate with experts for appraisal, restoration, or conservation as needed.
  • Display and Storage: Manage the display and storage of collection items, ensuring they are presented and preserved in optimal conditions.

Culinary and Meal Planning:

  • Dietary Management: Address any special dietary needs or preferences of family members, ensuring that meals meet specific health or dietary guidelines.

Requirements:

  • 8-10 years relevant work experiences
  • Attention to details
  • Flexibility and Adaptability


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website

www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
